changes: The level cap has been increased to 60.
New blue magic spells have been added.
Mighty Guard: Enmity generation has been increased.
Fixed an issue wherein the help text for the PvP actions Hyosho Ranryu and Goka Mekkyaku was incorrect (the effects of these actions were not changed).
Fixed an issue wherein executing the PvP action Displacement would also trigger the cooldown of Corps-a-corps.

new_content.name: Onsal Hakair (Danshig Naadam)
new_content.description: A new Frontline PvP campaign where three teams of 24 players battle to claim sacred sites known as ovoos to earn tactical ratings.

new_content.name: Blue Mage Log
new_content.description: A system allowing blue mages to form parties and complete specific duties (dungeons, trials, and raids) to earn rewards.

new_content.name: Masked Carnivale
new_content.description: New stages added to the existing Masked Carnivale challenge.

housing.name: Vegetable Garden
housing.description: An enormous patch of soil for growing vegetables, complete with a selection of verdant crops. ※Up to ten flower plots may be placed in a single garden, regardless of type.

housing.name: Cedar Tree
housing.description: A towering cedar tree that retains its vibrant green throughout the year.

housing.name: Wooden Deck
housing.description: A large, rectangular section of wooden decking, complete with low fences, flower baskets, and a table laid with tea for two.

housing.name: Greatwood Planter
housing.description: Botanists would no doubt be fascinated and confused in equal measure by this inexplicably effervescent potted plant.

housing.name: Vanity Mirror
housing.description: This gold-framed mirror reflects your true self. Your true self apparently glows in a rather unsettling fashion.

housing.name: Empty Boxes
housing.description: Though they take up rather a lot of floor space, this pile of boxes gives the impression that you have a host of admirers willing to shower you with gifts─which is surely more than worth the increased difficulty of walking through your home.

glamour.name: Incendiario
glamour.description: Blue Mage's Arm, Item Level: 270 / Equipment Level: 60
